title: Cheesy Corn One-Pot Pasta
summary: A creamy, oozy one-pot pasta for when you want a big bowl of comfort food with a little bit of goodness. It’s the perfect combo of sweet, savoury, salty and spicy.

method.description: Add ¾ of the sweetcorn (with its liquid) to a blender along with milk, stock, cornflour and turmeric. Blitz until smooth. If it's too bitty, pass it through a fine sieve and discard the bits, then set aside. Trim and thinly slice the spring onion, separating the whites from greens.

Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a saucepan set over a medium-high heat. Stir fry the lardons until crispy, then use a slotted spoon to transfer to a plate and set aside until it's time to serve. Add the spring onion whites and ½ the spring onion greens into the pan and cook for 2-3 mins until softened. Set aside the remaining spring onion greens for garnish.

Add the pasta to the saucepan and pour over the blended corn milk. Mix to combine and season with salt and plenty of freshly cracked black pepper. Bring to the boil, then turn the heat down to medium and leave to simmer, stirring occasionally, until the pasta is cooked to al dente (normally around 10 mins but follow the packet instructions).
Once the pasta has cooked, stir through the cheeses, the remaining corn and the pickled jalapeño slices. Taste and season to taste with some pickle brine, salt and pepper, if needed.
Spoon into bowls and garnish with the lardons and remaining spring onion greens.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
